steps.label: Walls & Ceiling
steps.guide: Capture scuffs, holes, or water stains.

steps.label: Flooring & Carpet
steps.guide: Focus on stains or loose tiles.

steps.label: Windows & Blinds
steps.guide: Check for cracks or broken slats.

steps.label: Appliances
steps.guide: Open oven and fridge. Capture any grime or damage.

steps.label: Cabinets & Counters
steps.guide: Capture chips, scratches, or loose hinges.

steps.label: Shower & Tub
steps.guide: Check for drainage issues or stains.
